name_en: M12598 Black Flower! Victor Wallet. This elegant Victor wallet is crafted from Monogram Eclipse canvas, featuring a practical design that holds coins, business cards, bills, and receipts. The wallet features a snap closure and includes a bill pocket, five card slots for credit cards or transit cards, and a zip coin pocket. The Victor wallet is compact and easily fits into a pocket.
name_cn:
M12598 Black Flower! Victor Wallet. This elegant Victor wallet is crafted from Monogram Eclipse canvas, featuring a practical design that holds coins, business cards, bills, and receipts. The wallet features a snap closure and includes a bill pocket, five card slots for credit cards or transit cards, and a zip coin pocket. The Victor wallet is compact and easily fits into a pocket.
11.5 x 9 x 2.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
